text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! It's about time to start training!

text_block_list.name: TV Show Host
text_block_list.text: Today, we once more present Honing Extraordinary Talents! We'll be serving you the most tantalizing information all the way into the late hours of the night!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! It's them! They're basically legendary! This
show is a must-watch for any genius!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But did they just say they'll go super late? I have
training today... but on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! I have outstanding talent! I can quickly
recover from any delay in practice!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This TV show is today only! I can't afford to miss
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sakura Bakushin O is too enticed by the
TV to attend training.
